# Transmission flows defined

::: {style="font-size:1rem;"}

::: {.fragment}
Transmission flows at population-level:

- Let  $i,j \in \text{Pop}$ denote individuals, $a,b \in \text{A}$ groups.
- Then
<div style="font-size:1.5rem;">
$$\begin{align*}
  z_{ij} &\in \{0,1\} \\
  z_{ab} &= \textstyle\sum_{i,j} \mathbb{1}\{ z_{ij}=1 \} \: \mathbb{1}\{i \in a\} \: \mathbb{1}\{j \in b\} \\
  \pi_{a,b} &= z_{ab}/z^{+}, \quad z^{+} = \textstyle\sum_{a,b} z_{ab}
\end{align*}$$
</div>
:::

::: {.fragment}
Source profile for $b$ recipients (backwards profile):

- Fix $b$
<div style="font-size:1.5rem;">
$$
\delta^b_a = \pi_{ab} / \pi_{.b}, \quad \pi_{.b} = \sum_a \pi_{ab}
$$
</div>
:::

::: {.fragment}
Next generation profile for $a$ sources (forwards profile):

- Fix $a$
<div style="font-size:1.5rem;">
$$
\omega^a_b = \pi_{ab} / \pi_{a.}, \quad \pi_{a.} = \sum_b \pi_{ab}
$$
</div>
:::

:::
